site.title: Sebastian Rösch
site.description: B.Sc. Business Informatics · Curious Builder. Portfolio of Sebastian Rösch.
hero.intro: I build systems that run reliably and models that make a difference. Currently open to new challenges.
about.title: About me
about.body: I hold a B.Sc. in business informatics with a focus on data-driven systems — at Fraunhofer ISE I built load-forecasting models for buildings, and have since worked my way deeper into the platform side: Kubernetes, GitOps, ArgoCD. Between those, smaller experiments pile up, like a reinforcement-learning agent that learns to play Super Mario.
about.body.search: I'm currently looking for a role where I can build things and keep learning — software development, data or DevOps.
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my work — from platform engineering to machine learning.
